bimfactory.name: BIMFabrikHH
bimfactory.description: Conversion of GIS data into IFC format

headline.message: The {title} is a development of the City of Hamburg as part of the {link} project.
headline.title: BIMFabrikHH

startPage.description: Basic geodata such as DTMs, city models, etc. are an important basis for basic determination in the construction industry. This data is often available as GIS data. In order to implement the BIM method, this data must be converted into IFC format. The aim is therefore to provide geodata from heterogeneous formats in IFC format with relevant information.

list: Repetitive processes are simplified and standardized by this automation.
BIM use in the FHH is spread.
Usability in the master portal is improved.
